mcpToolDescription: Update the display text. Example: 'text Hello world!'
Change the display color. Example: 'color red' or 'color #FF0000'
Change the text color. Example: 'textcolor blue' or 'textcolor #0000FF'
Change the font size (1-4). Example: 'fontsize 3'
Set the display to landscape orientation.
Set the display to portrait orientation.
Display a JPEG image. Example: 'jpeg https://example.com/image.jpg'
Save the screen settings to non-volatile memory. Example: 'save'
Resume paused MP3 playback.
Pause MP3 playback and keep the current position visible.
Skip forward 10 seconds within the current MP3.
Skip backward 10 seconds within the current MP3.
Increase playback volume.
Decrease playback volume.
Enable or disable shuffle mode. Example: 'shuffle on' or 'shuffle off'
Enable or disable repeat-track mode. Example: 'repeattrack on' or 'repeattrack off'
Enable or disable repeat-playlist mode. Example: 'repeatplaylist on' or 'repeatplaylist off'
Pair with a Bluetooth headset or speaker. Example: 'pair'
Show Bluetooth audio connection status.
Disconnect the current Bluetooth audio device.
Forget the saved Bluetooth device and stop auto-reconnect.
